items.title: PODCAST: Pacers Add Kelly Oubre Jr. — But the East Isn’t Waiting
items.body_excerpt: On this episode of the Fieldhouse Files podcast — I discuss how the Pacers were quiet to start free agency, limited by what they could realistically offer. But on Day 2, they addressed one of their biggest needs by agreeing to a deal with Kelly Oubre Jr., a veteran wing with…
